hero.title: Intelligent Chat Data Assistant
hero.subtitle: Real-time local decryption with no repeated exports — query and analyze conversations through natural language AI chat

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Powerful AI Agent capabilities to help you efficiently query and understand chat data

personality.title: AI Agent Chat
personality.description: Ask questions in natural language — the AI automatically invokes tools to query contacts, chat history, search messages, and more

emotion.title: Multi-Engine Support
emotion.description: Supports LangGraph, Claude Code, Pi-AI and more, with flexible Deep/React Agent mode switching

intent.title: Real-Time Decryption, No Export Needed
intent.description: Decrypt local chat databases directly with CDC real-time incremental sync — no need to repeatedly export chat logs

multilingual.title: MCP Tool Extensions
multilingual.description: Supports Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to freely extend AI Agent tool capabilities

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to start intelligent chat data queries

step1.title: Install the App
step1.description: Download the installer for your OS from GitHub Releases — supports macOS and Windows

step2.title: Configure Decryption
step2.description: Open Data Decryption in Settings and follow the wizard to complete environment check, user selection, and database decryption

step3.title: Chat & Query
step3.description: Ask the AI questions in natural language to query and analyze your chat history

items.content: Rethink AI lets me quickly find key information in my chat history, greatly improving productivity.
items.author: Michael Zhang

items.content: Data stays completely local, so privacy is guaranteed. The AI query feature is incredibly useful.
items.author: Dr. Lisa Chen

items.content: Switching between Agent modes is flexible — Deep mode for complex analysis, React mode for quick queries.
items.author: David Wang

items.question: Is the app itself free?
items.answer: Yes, Rethink AI is completely free and open-source. Each user gets a $10 free quota — once exhausted, you'll be downgraded to a free model.

items.question: Which operating systems are supported?
items.answer: macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel) and Windows (64-bit) are supported.

items.question: How is data security ensured?
items.answer: All chat data is stored only on your local device and is never uploaded to any server. Only your question text is sent to the LLM provider when you ask a question. We have signed confidentiality agreements with all partnered LLM providers to ensure your data is protected.

items.question: How do I get started? Is there documentation?
items.answer: Check out our <docLink>documentation</docLink> for a complete guide including quick start, feature overview, and troubleshooting.
